name: Magic Swirl Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Generously grease and flour a 12-cup fluted tube pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until well blended.
4. Add eggs; beat well.
5. Stir together flour, 1 teaspoon baking soda, and salt; add alternately with buttermilk to the butter mixture.
6. Pour 4 cups of batter into prepared pan.
7. In remaining batter, stir chocolate topping and remaining 1/4 teaspoon baking soda.
8. Spoon over vanilla batter.
9. Sprinkle chocolate chips over surface.
10. Bake for 50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out almost clean.
11. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from pan to a wire rack.
12. Glaze with Chocolate drizzle (melt chocolate chips and shortening together).
